display.purpose: Page hero headlines only. Cormorant Garamond at maximum scale.

headline.purpose: Section headings. Cormorant Garamond at mid-scale. Max-width 18ch.

title.purpose: Sub-section headings, grid item titles. Cormorant Garamond at small scale.

body.purpose: Running text. Instrument Sans. Capped at 68ch.

label.purpose: Section markers, metadata. Uppercase Instrument Sans, tracked wide.

motion.name: rise
motion.purpose: Hero entrance animation. Staggered across label, h1, lead, and actions.

motion.name: ease-color
motion.purpose: Default easing for link and text color transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main call-to-action on dark surfaces. Burnt Sienna fill, uppercase, no radius.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-block; padding: 16px 36px; background: #D27A3F; color: #100D0A; text-decoration: none; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; border: 1px solid #D27A3F; transition: background 0.25s ease, border-color 0.25s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #E89968; border-color: #E89968; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Quiet companion CTA. Italic serif, no border, no background.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-block; padding: 16px 30px; color: #C4BCAC; text-decoration: none; font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-style: italic; font-size: 17px; transition: color 0.25s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { color: #D27A3F; }

components.name: CTA Button (Cream)
components.description: Primary CTA on cream surfaces. Inverted palette: dark fill, cream text.
components.css: .ds-cta-button { display: inline-block; padding: 20px 44px; background: #2A241C; color: #ECE5D5; text-decoration: none; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: background 0.3s ease; } .ds-cta-button:hover { background: #B85A20; }

components.name: Nav CTA
components.description: Navigation call-to-action. Italic serif, accent border, the only rounded element.
components.css: .ds-nav-cta { display: inline-block; font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 15px; font-style: italic; font-weight: 500; color: #D27A3F; padding: 7px 20px; border: 1px solid #D27A3F; border-radius: 1px; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.25s ease; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: #D27A3F; color: #100D0A; }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: Structural spine of every section. Uppercase, tracked, small.
components.html:
OUR PRACTICE
THE ENTRY ENGAGEMENT
components.css: .ds-section-label { font-family: 'Instrument Sans', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #7A736A; margin-bottom: 36px; } .ds-section-label.ds-accent { color: #D27A3F; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Sticky frosted nav. Wordmark left, uppercase links right, italic CTA.
components.html:
Agentic.Standard
FOUNDATIONMAPBook a Call
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 18px 40px; background: rgba(16, 13, 10, 0.94); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(232, 225, 212, 0.08); } .ds-wordmark { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 500; color: #E8E1D4; text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-dot { color: #D27A3F; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 36px; } .ds-nav-links > a { font-family: 'Instrument Sans', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #7A736A; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav-links > a:hover { color: #E8E1D4; } .ds-nav-links .ds-nav-cta { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 15px; font-style: italic; font-weight: 500; text-transform: none; letter-spacing: 0; color: #D27A3F; padding: 7px 20px; border: 1px solid #D27A3F; border-radius: 1px; transition: all 0.25s ease; } .ds-nav-links .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: #D27A3F; color: #100D0A; }

components.name: Evidence Block
components.description: Callout with accent left border and tinted background. For guarantees, stakes, evidence.
components.html:
OUR STAKES

If your sponsor isn't happy at week six, we don't get paid.
components.css: .ds-evidence { padding: 32px; border-left: 2px solid #D27A3F; background: rgba(210, 122, 63, 0.04); } .ds-evidence-label { display: block; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #D27A3F; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-evidence-body { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 18px; color: #C4BCAC; font-style: italic; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; max-width: 70ch; } .ds-evidence-body strong { color: #E8E1D4; font-style: normal; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; }

components.name: Italic Link
components.description: In-content cross-reference. Italic serif, accent color, arrow suffix.
components.css: .ds-italic-link { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-style: italic; color: #D27A3F; text-decoration: none; font-size: 16px; transition: color 0.2s ease; } .ds-italic-link:hover { color: #E89968; }

narrative.overview:
A private room where serious work gets discussed over warm light. Not a showroom, not a stage, not a conference room with a projector. The kind of space where a founder and a trusted advisor sit across from each other and speak directly. Dark walls, warm materials, the quiet confidence of a room that doesn't need to impress anyone.

The system rejects everything that signals "consulting theater": gradient blobs, illustration packs, logo bars, bouncy animations, stock photography, corporate blue, neon accents, glowing orbs. It rejects the template-polished Squarespace aesthetic that makes every boutique firm interchangeable. It rejects the SaaS landing page playbook entirely.

What it pursues instead: the weight of a well-set book, the warmth of aged paper, the directness of a handwritten brief. Every element earns its presence through content, not decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Dark, warm palette grounded in near-black and burnt orange; no cool tones
Serif display type (Cormorant Garamond) paired with clean sans body (Instrument Sans)
Border-grid layouts instead of cards; content separated by structure, not containers
Subtle grain texture overlay for tactile warmth
Italic serif used as the accent voice: CTAs, emphasis, editorial asides
Sharp, unrounded edges throughout; the system has no soft corners

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Burnt Sienna is the only saturated color in the system. No secondary accent, no tertiary, no status colors, no data-viz palette. If something needs emphasis, it's Burnt Sienna or it's typographic weight. The constraint is the identity.

rules.name: The Cream Inversion Rule
rules.body: Every page ends with a cream CTA section. On cream, the palette inverts: Dark Ember replaces Burnt Sienna, Ink Brown replaces Parchment, and the button flips to dark-on-light. The inversion is always the same; never improvised.

rules.name: The Italic Accent Rule
rules.body: Italic Cormorant Garamond in Burnt Sienna is the system's primary emphasis device. It replaces bold for editorial stress. Used inside headings for the key word, for CTA link text, for subtitles and pull quotes. It is never decorative; it always marks the operative word or the call to action.

rules.name: The Label Discipline Rule
rules.body: Every section opens with a label: 11px, uppercase, tracked at 0.22em, Instrument Sans. Labels are either Warm Stone or Burnt Sienna. No section exists without its label. The label is the structural skeleton of the entire site.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No element casts a shadow. If a future component needs perceived depth, use tonal stepping (Smoked Oak) or border separation. Shadows are reserved for truly exceptional moments; reaching for one should feel like breaking a rule, because it is.

dos: Do use Burnt Sienna exclusively for emphasis. One accent, applied with restraint. Its power comes from scarcity.
Do open every section with an uppercase label. The label is the skeleton; the heading is the voice.
Do constrain heading line lengths (12-18ch for Display, 18ch for Headline). Let the serif break dramatically across lines.
Do use italic Cormorant Garamond as the accent voice for CTAs, emphasis, and editorial asides.
Do separate content with border grids, not cards. Lines, not boxes.
Do end every page with the cream CTA inversion.
Do use clamp() for all responsive sizing.
Do include the grain texture overlay on every page.
Do include print styles on long-form pages.
donts: Don't introduce a second accent color. The system has one voice.
Don't use gradient blobs, illustration packs, 'trusted by' logo bars, or bouncy animations.
Don't use corporate blue, stock photography, or meaningless buzzwords about 'digital transformation.'
Don't use neon accents, glowing orbs, particle effects, 'powered by AI' badges, or futuristic sans-serifs.
Don't use box-shadows for decoration. The system is flat.
Don't use border-radius greater than 1px on any element.
Don't use bold for emphasis in body text. Use italic Cormorant in Burnt Sienna.
Don't create card components with background fills, rounded corners, and internal padding.
Don't animate layout properties. Only rise (opacity + translateY) on hero elements.
